programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Festive drama with Brittany Bristow. Chocolatier Charlotte learns that her new love, Henry, owns a company intent on destroying her store. Can the fledgling couple overcome this rocky road? (2024)
